title: Otherworld [wonderland.jar]
description: A small modpack focusing on wonderland.jar and performance.
body:
![Wonderland.png](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/7JTFq0He/images/e93ddd96afb5903259603dccd761d2d30c715b0c.png)
#


This modpack centers around the unsettling horror of [wonderland.jar](https://modrinth.com/mod/wonderland-jar) — a mod that creeps into your world and won’t let go. In every shadow, something watches… and eventually, it steps through into your reality.

wonderland.jar introduces no_one, a mysterious entity that stalks players relentlessly and can pull you into “Wonderland” — an eerie network of liminal dimensions filled with endless corridors and impossible spaces.

Inside Wonderland, you will find:
- 11 surreal and unsettling levels
- 13 different entities, some passive… others actively hunting
- Thick fog, distorted spaces, and a constant sense of dread

This modpack is built to deliver a slow, psychological horror experience. You are never truly alone. Even when nothing is there, it feels like something should be.

Explore carefully. Listen closely.

Wonderland is always watching.
